knownIncomplete.fir_scope: Smoke and assembly awareness only; not a product-complete signal.

appTester.reason: Lucy Social is an operator dashboard surface, not an installable public PWA.

expect.detail: Lucy Social dashboard should be public, while Worker intelligence endpoints remain protected and the internal distribution contract is present.
The deployed Lucy Social dashboard route should return HTTP 200.
The Hopper social health endpoint must remain hidden behind Cloudflare Access.
The new Lucy Social intelligence endpoint must remain hidden behind Cloudflare Access.
The deployed dashboard bundle should expose the internal social distribution and scheduling contract.
